notableEvents.label: Jared Oliva GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jared Oliva grounds into a double play, third baseman Edmundo Sosa to second baseman Dylan Moore to first baseman Bryce Harper. Daniel Susac out at 2nd. Jared Oliva out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jared Oliva rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jared Oliva grounds into a double play, third baseman Edmundo Sosa to second baseman Dylan Moore to first baseman Bryce Harper. Daniel Susac out at 2nd. Jared Oliva out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Catcher Rafael Marchán picks off Jared Oliva at 1st on throw to first baseman Bryce Harper.

notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Justin Crawford. Rafael Devers scores. Casey Schmitt to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Harrison Bader pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Harrison Bader lines out to left fielder Otto Kemp.

notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee flies out to center fielder Justin Crawford.

notableEvents.label: Harrison Bader pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Harrison Bader grounds out, shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper.

notableEvents.label: Rafael Marchán pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Marchán called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Rafael Marchán pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Marchán lines out to left fielder Heliot Ramos.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jared Oliva reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Trea Turner. Daniel Susac to 2nd. Daniel Susac advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Trea Turner.

notableEvents.detail: Rafael Marchán flies out to center fielder Harrison Bader.
